title: Job Opening Software Engineer at Google India Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Software Engineer at Google India Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
Google India Consulting Pvt Ltd has an exciting opening for a Software Engineer at our Ludhiana office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Google India Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Google India Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Google India Consulting Pvt Ltd!
